Full-stack and mobile engineering

Senior Full-Stack Developer for mobile + web.

I build end-to-end features with React, React Native, PHP, and pragmatic AI integrations, with a focus on reliability, performance, and useful products.

Production React Native + Expo PHP + MySQL APIs Firebase auth, app data, deep links Stripe payments + webhooks AI-powered product features Testing, debugging, safe releases
View featured work View resume

Open to senior full-stack and mobile roles, remote or hybrid. Based in Northeast Ohio.

A few things I care about

Software should feel simple on the surface and solid underneath.

I like shipping useful products, tightening the details that make them reliable, and working within real-world constraints.

Mobile + backend Comfortable across UI, APIs, data flows, and rollout details.
Product-minded I like owning the problem, not just the ticket.
Release-safe Safe releases, good debugging, and boring reliability.
Modern stack React Native, React, PHP, MySQL, Firebase, Stripe, and AI integrations.

Featured work

Featured work

A few projects that reflect the kind of work I like doing most: useful tools, real-world constraints, and ideas I wish already existed.

Project details

Mobile Platform - live production experiences

Built and shipped end-to-end features for a production React Native app, including AI-assisted experiences, backend APIs, and safer rollout patterns.

Senior full-stack contributor Mobile + backend

React Native, Expo, TypeScript, PHP, MySQL, Firebase, Stripe, AI APIs

  • Shipped new gameplay and content flows under real release timelines and product constraints.
  • Built backend endpoints and data models to support scalable, repeatable experiences.
  • Added AI-assisted features and release guardrails that made iteration safer and easier to support.
View project details

Project details

Schade Brothers - business website + lead flow

Built from scratch for my brother and me: a website for our commercial insulation company with a clear path to quote requests.

End-to-end builder Own business, strategy, UX, build, deploy

Content strategy, custom front-end build, SEO fundamentals, performance-first UI

  • Built clear service pages and a prominent quote path to reduce friction.
  • Kept the layout mobile-first with scannable value props and visible trust cues.
  • Structured the site for clean call-to-action tracking, search-friendly metadata, and low maintenance.
View project details

In progress

Public Tennis Court Finder

A location-based mobile app for quickly finding nearby public outdoor tennis courts without the noise of private clubs or restricted facilities.

Solo builder Product, mobile, data

Product design, location data, lightweight verification, mobile-first UX

  • Started from a simple question: what do I wish existed that would actually be useful?
  • Focused on public outdoor courts, fast directions, and the details that matter in the moment.
  • Designed to improve over time with lightweight community verification and updates.
View project details

Skills

Skills

Tools I have used in production and can speak to in depth.

Frontend

React, TypeScript, state management, form UX, performance tuning

Mobile

React Native, Expo, push notifications, store releases

Backend

PHP, REST APIs, MySQL data modeling, caching strategies

Data + infrastructure

Firebase Auth, Firestore, FCM, background jobs, monitoring basics

Payments

Stripe Checkout, subscriptions, webhooks, idempotency

AI integrations

LLM API patterns, prompt guardrails, evaluation mindset, safe fallback states

Quality

Testing strategy, debugging, release checklists, incident fixes

About

About

I love building useful tools. My goal is for those tools to feel as simple and intuitive as possible, both for the person using them and for the dev team, or future me, working on them later.

That usually pulls me toward full-stack work: the places where frontend, backend, data, and product decisions all meet. I enjoy working through the details that make software easier to use, easier to maintain, and easier to trust.

A lot of the time, my starting point is simple: if there is something I wish existed, I will usually try to build it.

Along with coding, I enjoy cooking, good music, television, and movies. I also love being active, particularly by playing tennis, basketball, golf, and ping-pong.

Contact

Contact

If you are hiring for senior full-stack or mobile work, I would love to hear what you are building. LinkedIn or the form below are the easiest ways to reach me.

Send a message

Messages sent here land in the site inbox, and I usually reply within one to two business days.

Built with care for speed, accessibility, and clarity.
